title: Raise the repository quality coverage gate to 85 percent
outOfScope: Production behavior changes unrelated to testability

sources.reason: Current quality command and 80 percent coverage gate.
Measured uncovered paths from the latest full quality run.
High-risk lifecycle closure paths with existing focused tests.
High-risk public release integrity paths with existing focused tests.
Governance and installer invariant paths exposed by the remediation cycle.
Project governance branch and invariant coverage.

problemStatement: The repository quality command currently enforces only 80 percent total coverage; the latest measured total is 83.94 percent, below the Conditional GO release prerequisite of 85 percent.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The quality command fails when total coverage is below 85 percent.
New tests cover high-risk lifecycle, release integrity, and governance branches without exclusions.
The full quality suite passes at or above 85 percent twice from a clean worktree.

riskAssessment.reason: The coverage threshold is a release prerequisite; exclusions or weak tests would create a false readiness signal.

executionDecision.reason: The coverage report identifies concrete uncovered branches and the required threshold is explicit in the plan.

preReviewWarnings: Do not add coverage exclusions or lower the threshold.
Record two clean full-suite runs with exact coverage totals.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record the measured coverage baseline and final threshold evidence.

acceptance: make quality enforces total measured coverage at or above 85.00 percent.
Tests cover the highest-risk uncovered lifecycle, release integrity, and governance paths without exclusions.
No source path, test path, or coverage omission is added solely to inflate the percentage.
Two clean full-suite runs record total coverage at or above 85 percent.
guidelines: Use tests to cover real behavior and failure paths rather than coverage exclusions.
Keep the coverage threshold blocking and visible in the registered quality command.
Record exact verification evidence before claiming release readiness.

intent.problem: The release prerequisite requires at least 85 percent measured coverage, but the repository currently reports 83.94 percent.
constraints: Do not exclude code or lower thresholds.
Prioritize high-risk paths introduced or exposed by the remediation cycle.
Keep quality reproducible from a clean worktree.
intent.rationale: Raising the executable gate and covering meaningful failure paths prevents release readiness from relying on an 80 percent floor.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the complete remediation cycle and the 85 percent quality gate.

rollbackNote: Revert the coverage threshold and added tests together, preserving the prior quality command and test suite.
